subcodes.first_line: O Ali! God willing, in these blessed days mayest thou be occupied with the remembrance of the Lord of all mankind, and be detached from such people as are like unto cattle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی انشاء الله در این سید ایام بذکر مالک انام مشغول باشی و از انام کالانعام فارغ و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @education and the development of capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
